# Session materials


```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" property="stylesheet" href="https://elixirtess.github.io/TeSS_widgets/css/tess-widget.css"/>
<div id="tess-widget-materials-collection" class="tess-widget tess-widget-list"></div>
<script>
function initTeSSWidgets() {
    TessWidget.Materials(document.getElementById('tess-widget-materials-collection'),
        'DropdownTable',
        {
            opts: {
                columns: [{name: 'Name', field: 'title'},
                    {name: 'Description', field: 'description'}],
                dropdowns: [{name: 'Topic', field: 'keywords'}],
                truncateLength: 0
            },
            params: {
                collections: ['CAFE (Code Along, Feel Empowered)']
            },
            baseUrl: 'https://taxila.nl/'
        });
}
</script>
<script async="" defer="" src="https://elixirtess.github.io/TeSS_widgets/js/tess-widget-standalone.js" onload="initTeSSWidgets()"></script>

```
